title: Caption Property
description: Sets / returns the text to be displayed for an objects' label on the screen.
notes: The Caption property allows you to assign a meaningful label to the vision object.  By default, the Caption property is an empty string, and the name of the object will be used as it's label.
see_also:
Name Property
